business.name: Cooper Tree Service
business.tagline: Professional tree removal and care for Charleston homes and businesses

hero.headline: When the storm hits, *we're already on the way*
hero.subheadline: Same-day estimates, next-day service — Charleston's go-to tree crew for 20+ years

services_section.label: TREE WORK
services_section.heading: Every job from ground to crown
services_section.subheading: Storm damage to routine maintenance — we handle it all

services.title: Emergency Tree Removal
services.description: Fallen trees, storm damage, dangerous hangers. We show up fast and clean up completely.

services.title: Tree Trimming & Pruning
services.description: Keep your trees healthy and your property safe. Professional cutting that promotes growth.

services.title: Stump Grinding
services.description: Complete stump removal and grinding. Your yard ready for whatever comes next.

services.title: Lot Clearing
services.description: Multiple trees, thick brush, complete land clearing. One crew handles the whole job.

about.heading: Charleston tree crew that shows up
about.body: We're the Charleston tree service your neighbors call first. Real crew, real equipment, real results.

reviews.name: Reca H.
reviews.text: Jonathan did an amazing job — second tree he's handled for me. Very dependable and reliable. Excellent work, highly recommend!

reviews.name: William P.
reviews.text: Everything professionally done from quote to completion. Very skilled cutting large spruce near power lines — tree fell exactly where planned.

reviews.name: Marlo L.
reviews.text: After severe storm damage, they gave estimate same day I called and completed the cleanup job the next day. Crew worked hard!

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Covering the Charleston area
service_areas.subheading: Professional tree service throughout Kanawha County

cta.heading: Ready to get that tree handled?
cta.body: Free estimates on all tree work. Call today and we'll get you taken care of.
